l6_mechanism: Phase 0 ghost0 paces so its replay reaches portal pad (13,25) at P2 step 8, teleports to (13,13), walks UU to mod[3] at (13,1) and holds obs[0] open. Phase 1 ghost1 hits mod[2] at step 3 toggling obs[1] off, wild ghost then toggles mod[0] firing left portal swap, ghost1 navigates through (31,1) to mod[1] firing right portal swap. Phase 2 player walks to (49,37), paces while swap triggers, teleports to (49,49), LLL to goal.
